summary: The diff implements the core requirements: removes the standalone /symptom-checker route from App.tsx, adds HealthPage.tsx with an embedded Symptom Checker component, and updates Header.tsx to include a /health navigation link without any /symptom-checker reference. REQ-4, REQ-5, and REQ-6 appear substantially addressed. The frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms no references to /symptom-checker in Header.tsx. The HealthPage.tsx embeds the Symptom Checker inline. App.tsx shows no /symptom-checker route entry.

hallucinated_features.description: AdminCRMPage.tsx was modified, adding or updating a full CRM lead management page with lead statuses, lead table, dialog forms, and sample data — this was not requested in the build request.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only concerns removing the /symptom-checker route and keeping the Symptom Checker embedded in the Health tab. No CRM or admin page changes were requested.
